summary: Markets exhibit caution amid geopolitical tensions from US-Iran clashes and upcoming US payrolls data, with digital assets softening as Bitcoin dips below USD 80k on ETF outflows, commodities mixed with oil declining and gold resilient near USD 4,700, and forex pairs like EURUSD testing key resistance levels.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin is a freight train heading to $82K with pullbacks to key levels offering entry before breakout, avoiding exit liquidity.

signals.name: Internet Computer
signals.reason: ICP charted with order blocks and scam wicks as a top altcoin to long before BTC hits $82K.

signals.name: Binance Coin
signals.reason: BNB identified for longing with order blocks ahead of BTC $82K move to trap liquidity early.

signals.name: Ondo Finance
signals.reason: ONDO highlighted as key altcoin to accumulate and long before Bitcoin breakout to $82K.

signals.name: Jito
signals.reason: JTO setup for longing using order blocks and hunting scam wicks prior to BTC reaching $82K.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Held steady around USD 2,280 amid broader crypto softness but with bullish potential from weak payrolls raising Fed rate-cut odds.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: Traded near USD 88 as digital assets softened overnight on geopolitical risks and cautious sentiment.

signals.name: XRP
signals.reason: Priced around USD 1.39 in line with broader crypto weakness from ETF flows and risk-off tone.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Tested resistance at 4,734–4,713 with bears defending but resilient above USD 4,500 amid central bank demand.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Falling from resistance at 95.78–94.97 with weekly declines amid unfounded optimism over Iran conflict resolution.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: Poised to break above 1.1760 with massive resistance at 1.18-1.1850 but momentum building.

signals.name: USD/CAD
signals.reason: Choppy within established range with support at 1.35 and resistance at 1.3750.

signals.name: Silver
signals.reason: Leads weekly gains with nearly 5% advance while broader commodities decline.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: Weaker alongside crypto equities and broader equities fall on energy and earnings pressure.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: No direct mention but aligned with Nasdaq momentum in key zones amid market friction.
